assertions.title: EditorView renders header, dual-panel main, and footer
assertions.reason: Targeted EditorView tests confirmed one render includes header, main with at least two direct section children, and footer.

assertions.title: Top bar shows BrandMark SVG, script name, and all toolbar buttons
assertions.reason: Focused tests verified the header contains an SVG brand mark, Ghostprompter wordmark/tagline, current script name, and buttons New/Open/Save/Save As/Settings.

assertions.title: File indicator shows dirty/clean state
assertions.reason: Tests covered both dirty and clean states, including Draft/Saved badges and the unsaved-changes aria-label on the dirty dot.

assertions.title: Go Live CTA button present with accessible label
assertions.reason: Tests resolved the header CTA via getByRole using the accessible name 'Go Live', and static analysis confirmed aria-label="Go Live" in EditorView.

assertions.title: Open button triggers file dialog and read_script IPC
assertions.reason: Targeted tests verified the Open button triggers the Tauri open dialog and calls invoke('read_script', { path }) when a file is selected; store wiring matches the static implementation.

assertions.title: Save button triggers save_script IPC
assertions.reason: Tests confirmed Save calls invoke('save_script', { path, content }) for existing paths and via the save dialog flow for pathless scripts; the script dirty flag also resets false after save.

assertions.title: Go Live triggers enter_teleprompter_mode IPC with script and rect
assertions.reason: Focused Go Live tests verified invoke('enter_teleprompter_mode') receives script name/content plus numeric rect coordinates, and failure handling alerts while keeping editor mode.

assertions.title: Go Live registers hotkeys after teleprompter mode entry
assertions.reason: Tests verified register_hotkeys occurs after enter_teleprompter_mode succeeds, receives settings hotkeys, and leaves playing=false after completion.

commandsRun.observation: Focused Vitest run passed: 1 file passed, 22 targeted tests passed, 37 non-matching tests in the file were skipped by the filter.
